title: COMPANY PROFILE
content:
Pluridisciplinary organization set-up in 2011 backed by
young, enthusiastic, experienced and well-qualified team
of
Bio-medical
Engineers
&
MBAs
having
sound
experience in healthcare sector.
Operating in the field of Hospital Project and expertise in
Modular Operation Theatre & Medical Gas Pipeline
System planning, designing and supply of clean room
facility in hospital as per NABH/ISO5 guideline,
Our prime objective is to design world class clean room
facility by adopting a new techniques at affordable cost.
We are also offering a consultancy service of Engineering
Department in hospital as per NABH & JCI standards.
We have In-house Engineering team who look after AutoCAD Design for Modular Panels, HVAC Systems & Medical
Gas pipeline.
We have In house Installation Team for Modular Panels,
Vinyl Flooring & Medical Gas Pipeline System.
100+ fully satisfied customers in a short span of 7 years
spread across most of Gujarat.
Looking for an opportunity to utilise our skills &
knowledge in the field of Pharmaceutical facility.

title: MOT - CONCEPT
content:
A jointless and seamless structure is designed and
installed with the aim to provide a clean and hygienic (0.3
micron) environment inside the O.T. to avoid any kind of
infection to the patient during the surgery controlling the
temperature, pressure and humidity.
It employs control over the particulate matter in air
with temperature, humidity and pressure control as
required thereby reducing bacteria by a factor of 15,000.

title: DIVISIONS OF O.T.
content: •  Superspeciality

title: O.T.
content:
–
Neuroscience,
Orthopedics,
Cardiothoracic & Transplant surgery
•  General O.T. – Laparoscopy, Ophthalmology, Gynecology,
ENT, Dental, etc.

title: NABH GUIDELINES
content:
Dedicated A.H.U. for every OT
No Window & Split AC
Wall, Ceiling & Flooring material should be non-porous,
jointless-seamless without 90° corners & washable with antibacterial and anti-fungal properties.
Cleaning of pre-filters
Validation

title: MOT - COMPONENTS
content:
Primary Component - Vertical Laminar Air Flow kills any
bacteria present inside the O.T. area giving 0.3 micron
clean air.
Secondary Component - Complete jointless and seamless
structure without any 90° corners for the prevention of
bacterial formation in the corners, joints or cracks.

title: LAMINAR AIR FLOW (LAF)
content:
Air Handling Unit (A.H.U.)
AC connected to AHU
HEPA Filters
Plenum(Filter Housing) Box above OT Table
Ducting

title: ANTI-BACTERIAL PAINT - SPECIFICATIONS
content:
Two-Three layers of paint with the D.F.T. of 2-3 micron with
one layer of primer. Joints & corners are sealed and roundedoff using putty.

content:
Hand Paint (Roller)
Machine Paint (Spray)

title: ACP/HPL SHEET - SPECIFICATIONS
content:
ACP/HPL Sheet of 3/4 mm thickness are erected on
aluminum framing. Joints & corners are in radius & sealed
using Silicon.

title: ACP/HPL SHEET - MERITS
content:
Cost-effective
Resistant to moisture and abrasion
Life of 10-12 years
Glare Free

title: ACP/HPL SHEET - DEMERITS
content:
Silicon wears out on longer run
No insulation backing
Chances of crack

content:
Pre-coated (which is not anti-bacterial)
Hand/Machine Paint on site.

content:
GI Sheets are sandwiched between a layer of PUF (Polyurethane foam) of thickness 30/40mm. Joints & corners are in
radius & sealed using silicon or paint is applied.

content:

Glare Free

content:

Chances of rusting

title: Glossary
content:
HPL = High Pressure Laminate
ACP = Aluminium Composite Panel
MGPS = Medical Gas Pipeline System
OT = Operation Theatre
NABH = National Accreditation Board for Hospitals & Healthcare Providers

title: FLOORING BRANDS
content:
Wellman Group uses the following vinyl flooring brands for hospitals and modular OTs:
1. Tarkett – International brand, widely used in hospital OTs. Anti-static, seamless, glare-free vinyl flooring.
2. Gerflor (also called Ger) – French brand, premium hospital-grade vinyl flooring. Anti-microbial, jointless/seamless.
3. Geo – Indian brand, cost-effective vinyl flooring option for hospitals.
All three are suitable for modular operation theatres and cleanrooms as they are non-porous, seamless, and anti-static.

title: FLOORING COMPARISON
content:
Flooring options used in Wellman Group projects — comparison:

1. Epoxy Flooring
   - Lifespan: 4–5 years
   - Cost: Low
   - Properties: Moisture resistant, seamless, easy to clean
   - Limitation: Not anti-static, shorter life

2. Vinyl Flooring (Tarkett / Gerflor / Geo)
   - Lifespan: 10–12 years
   - Cost: Medium
   - Properties: Anti-static, jointless/seamless, glare-free, recyclable, anti-microbial
   - Best for: OT, ICU, NICU, IVF labs
   - Brands: Tarkett (international), Gerflor (French/premium), Geo (Indian/budget)

3. Marble Flooring
   - Lifespan: 12–15 years
   - Cost: Medium-High
   - Properties: Durable, aesthetic
   - Limitation: Has joints — NOT suitable for cleanroom/NABH-compliant OT (bacteria can form in joints)

Recommendation: Vinyl flooring (Tarkett or Gerflor) is the best choice for NABH-compliant modular OTs as it is jointless, seamless, anti-static and meets ISO 5 / Class 100 requirements.

title: FLOORING NABH REQUIREMENTS
content:
NABH requirements for OT flooring:
- Must be non-porous (no joints or cracks where bacteria can form)
- Jointless and seamless construction
- No 90-degree corners (coved edges required)
- Washable with anti-bacterial and anti-fungal properties
- Anti-static (especially important in OT where electrical equipment is used)
- Glare-free surface

Vinyl flooring (Tarkett, Gerflor, Geo brands) meets all NABH flooring requirements.
Epoxy flooring partially meets requirements but has a shorter lifespan.
Marble flooring does NOT meet NABH requirements due to joints.
